overall.description: A cinematic third-person game sequence showing a red-haired character walking along a coastal cliff path toward ancient ruins, descending stone steps to a cave entrance marked by warning signs and a giant skeleton.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path with ancient stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cliffside dirt path toward the ocean horizon

entered.detail: tall ancient stone column with ornate carvings on the right side of the path
large rocky outcrop forming the left boundary of the path
distant ocean meeting the cloudy sky with warm golden light reflecting on water
weathered stone structures and broken columns scattered along the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open coastal cliff path during golden hour, with ancient stone ruins on the right and a large cliff formation on the left. The ocean stretches out ahead under a partly cloudy sky, and a prominent stone pillar stands on the right side of the path.

events.description: bioluminescent plants begin glowing along both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain begins to slope downward toward the shore

entered.detail: bushes emitting soft yellow-green light lining the left side of the path
stone stairway leading down to the lower coastal level becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the stone pillar passes behind while glowing vegetation appears along the path edges. The terrain opens up to reveal stone steps descending toward the ocean, with the cliff formation receding into the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway descending to coastal cave entrance

events.description: character begins descending the stone steps toward the lower shore level
wooden warning sign with skull symbol comes into view on the right

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down the stone steps toward a small figure standing near the water

notable_agents.action: small hooded figure holding a lantern standing near the cave entrance ahead

entered.detail: wooden post with skull and crossbones symbol and warning text
weathered wooden posts marking the path edge along the cliff
massive ribcage and skull of a sea creature visible through the rock archway

segments.scene_description: The character descends weathered stone steps toward the shore, passing glowing vegetation that falls behind. A wooden warning sign with a skull symbol appears on the right, while ahead, a small hooded figure stands near the water's edge. Through a rock archway, the massive skeleton of a sea creature becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave entrance with giant creature skeleton

events.description: entering the rocky cave archway passing under the giant skeleton remains

agents.ego_description: walking into the cave entrance, approaching the hooded figure and the massive skeleton

notable_agents.action: hooded figure holding a glowing lantern standing near the cave entrance

entered.detail: natural rock archway forming the entrance to the coastal cave
ancient carved stone blocks and broken columns lining the cave entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadowy cave archway, passing the warning sign and approaching the hooded figure with the lantern. The massive skeleton of a sea creature dominates the cave interior, its ribcage arching overhead as ancient stone ruins line the path. The lighting shifts to a darker, more enclosed atmosphere as the character moves deeper into the cave.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched coastal cliff path into the shadowy depths of an ancient sea cave. It begins with the character walking past stone ruins and a prominent pillar under a golden hour sky, with the vast ocean stretching ahead. As the character progresses, the terrain opens up to reveal weathered stone steps descending toward the shore, while glowing vegetation begins to line the path. The scene then shifts as the character descends these steps, passing a wooden warning sign with a skull symbol before approaching a hooded figure standing near a rock archway. Finally, the camera enters the enclosed cave, where the lighting dims and the massive ribcage of a sea creature skeleton arches overhead among the ruins.
